candidate_assessments.recommendation_note: Best stable finalist; complete identity, net, connector-confidence, provenance, and downstream handoff coverage.

missing_or_weak_items: Stage C rule review missed one provenance-boundary criterion.
candidate_assessments.recommendation_note: Good shadow when concise output matters, but uses higher model tier and had slightly weaker rerun coverage.

critical_errors: J1 connector/interface over-confirmation recurred in Stage C.
candidate_assessments.recommendation_note: Do not use as primary despite fast wall time.

limitations: A compact LLM shortlist prompt was attempted after Stage A but timed out before producing an archived response.
Final shortlist decision therefore uses frozen rule gates plus main-agent semantic review over archived outputs.
